title: cyperus arsenei
intro: Cyperus arsenei, also known as Bitter Grass or Cyperus Bitter, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus arsenei include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, among others. Cyperus arsenei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
